extDesc.message: Send images, videos, and PDFs from the current page to HEIC etc Viewer.

popupNoTab.message: This page cannot be scanned. Try a regular web page.

popupNoFiles.message: No files to send were found on this page.

optUrlDesc.message: Set this only if you want to override the default destination $URL$.

optSmallImgDesc.message: Images with a width or height at or below these values count as small.

optSmallVidDesc.message: Videos with a file size at or below this value count as small.

optBug.message: Found a bug? Report it on GitHub Issues.

sndBlocked.message: The viewer window could not be opened automatically. Use the button below.

sndWaiting.message: Waiting for the viewer to get ready…

sndTimeout.message: No response from the viewer. Check the destination URL in the options, and make sure HEIC etc Viewer is v3.15.0 or later.

sndFailListLabel.message: Files that could not be fetched:

sndSkippedBlob.message: Skipped (streaming/blob sources that cannot be fetched): $1

sndNoPayload.message: Nothing to send. Use the Send button in the extension popup.
